fato_historico: 1979: The oil tanker SS Atlantic Empress collides with another oil tanker, causing the largest ever ship-borne oil spill.
energia_do_dia: The stars invite you to embrace your depth today. Much like the vast ocean, your feelings carry immense power. Consider the immense strength found in quiet waters, even when the surface feels turbulent. It is a good time to spill your inner light into the world with grace, healing any old wounds that may surface softly.
frase_do_dia: Your gentle heart is the anchor that holds steady during the shifting tides.
significado_numero: Represents the completion of a cycle and reaching new personal heights.
conselho: Protect your inner peace by setting gentle boundaries with those around you today.
